creator: adamwschmidt@hotmail.com
text:
When trying to install p5-Tk from ports, I receive the following error:


In file included from Xlib_f.c:8:
Xlib.h:22: error: conflicting types for 'XKeycodeToKeysym'
/usr/local/include/X11/Xlib.h:1702: error: previous declaration of 'XKeycodeToKeysym' was here
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/p5-Tk/work/Tk-804.029/pTk.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/p5-Tk/work/Tk-804.029.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/p5-Tk.

Any help would be appreciated.
